headline: Vistra's Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: VST's Q4 earnings miss estimates, and revenues rise 13.5% year over year. The company outlines a 2026 EBITDA outlook of up to $7.6B and strong free cash flow.

raw.headline: Vistra's Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
raw.summary: VST's Q4 earnings miss estimates, and revenues rise 13.5% year over year. The company outlines a 2026 EBITDA outlook of up to $7.6B and strong free cash flow.

headline: Utilities: The Unexpected AI Infrastructure Trade
summary: Surging AI and data center demand is reshaping the utilities sector from a somewhat defensive yield play into a potential structural growth story.

raw.headline: Utilities: The Unexpected AI Infrastructure Trade
